title: Eliminate format_user defensive check chain with head destructuring + guard
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.Validator.format_user/1` from test_fixtures/bad_guards.ex. The current body is `if user != nil && is_binary(user.name) && byte_size(user.name) > 0`. Rewrite as two function heads: one matching `%{name: name}` with guard `when is_binary(name) and byte_size(name) > 0`, returning `String.upcase(name)`; another matching anything else, returning `"UNKNOWN"`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Validator do ... end` with just format_user.
tier_rationale: Three things must land together: head destructure, guard with composition, removal of `&&`. Sonnet typically misses the `&&` cleanup.
